description: Determines what types of damage the creature can resist.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines what types of damage the creature can resist.

entries.description: Resistant to all forms of damage.

descriptionTranslations.en: Resistant to all forms of damage.

entries.description: Only physical damage, not mental or psychic damage.

descriptionTranslations.en: Only physical damage, not mental or psychic damage.

entries.description: Only physical damage, except for energy damage (fire, lightning, etc.).

descriptionTranslations.en: Only physical damage, except for energy damage (fire, lightning, etc.).

entries.description: Only resistant to piercing attacks (arrows, bullets, etc.).

descriptionTranslations.en: Only resistant to piercing attacks (arrows, bullets, etc.).

entries.description: Only resistant to blunt attacks (clubs, fists, etc.).

descriptionTranslations.en: Only resistant to blunt attacks (clubs, fists, etc.).

entries.description: Only resistant to a special form of attack such as psychic abilities or magic.

descriptionTranslations.en: Only resistant to a special form of attack such as psychic abilities or magic.

entries.description: Resistant to all damage, except a certain type of special damage (such as magical attacks, or a certain substance, like silver weapons).

descriptionTranslations.en: Resistant to all damage, except a certain type of special damage (such as magical attacks, or a certain substance, like silver weapons).

entries.description: Roll twice on this table. If you get a duplicate result, ignore it and roll again. If you get a contradictory result, take the two results and use the one that seems most appropriate.

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll twice on this table. If you get a duplicate result, ignore it and roll again. If you get a contradictory result, take the two results and use the one that seems most appropriate.
